user.title: Set up RFLink Raw Tools
user.description: This adds the RFLink Raw Tools UI, clearer action labels, help buttons, and an optional dashboard page. It can also install the normal RFLink prerequisite YAML block into configuration.yaml for you.

error.prerequisite_install_failed: Could not install the RFLink prerequisite YAML. Check Home Assistant logs. If configuration.yaml already has a top-level rflink: block, edit that existing block manually.

abort.already_configured: RFLink Raw Tools is already configured.

init.title: RFLink Raw Tools options
init.description: Optionally install or update the normal RFLink prerequisite YAML block in configuration.yaml.

error.prerequisite_install_failed: Could not install the RFLink prerequisite YAML. Check Home Assistant logs. If configuration.yaml already has a top-level rflink: block, edit that existing block manually.
